pm_decision_extract.decision_or_assessment: Surge-short entry decision for AGMH following 88% intraday collapse on dilutive financing catalyst
evidence_used: filing_confirmation: no 8-K filings in last 90 days
evidence_missing: SEC 8-K filing confirming offering details (expected within T+4, normal lag)
Post-offering share count and dilution impact quantification
pm_decision_extract.reasoning_summary: AGMH surged 88% intraday (5.25 prior close → 9.68 open) on announcement of a $5.4M equity offering of 16.39M Class A shares and warrants, then collapsed 79.7% by decision time (5.12 close). The catalyst is a DILUTIVE FINANCING EVENT, not operational improvement. Narrative Agent confirms the offering is SPECIFIC (exact dollar amount, share count, dates) and SUPPORTED by GlobeNewswire press releases (T3 source). Alt-Data Verification finds STRUCTURAL ABSENCE of hard-to-fake corroboration: no SEC 8-K filing yet (normal lag but informative absence), no insider Form 4 activity (0 transactions in 90d), no 13F institutional positioning (adapter unavailable), no FMP sentiment (endpoints empty), no GitHub activity (unmapped). Wikipedia pageviews are mapped to unrelated historical airline article (data artifact). Fundamental snapshot (Q3 2024) shows positive earnings but is 6 months stale; valuation metrics are extreme (PE 0.109, PB 0.019) suggesting either data quality issue or severe distress. Surge-Short Agent recommends WATCH (not short) due to partial evidence sufficiency and missing SEC 8-K confirmation. Risk Agent finds NO HARD VETO TRIPPED: data_after_cutoff_used=false, lookahead_safe=true, no critical data_quality_flags, candidate_type=surge_short exempts from §5.13(d) pollution veto. Macro regime is Overheat/Moderately Restrictive with strict equity discipline; AGMH fails quality test. PREPONDERANCE OF EVIDENCE: The bear thesis is COHERENT and SUPPORTED by multiple dimensions: (1) MOMENTUM-DRIVEN SURGE on dilutive financing (not value creation); (2) STRUCTURAL ABSENCE of institutional/insider support (Form 4 zero, 13F unavailable, no analyst sentiment); (3) EXTREME VALUATION COMPRESSION (PE 0.109, PB 0.019) inconsistent with sustainable business; (4) NEGATIVE PRICE ACTION (79.7% 5d collapse) contradicting positive offering narrative; (5) MACRO HEADWINDS (Overheat regime, strict equity discipline); (6) CRYPTO/ASIC SECTOR CYCLICALITY (high volatility, regulatory uncertainty). The absence of SEC 8-K filing is EXPECTED given normal lag (1 business day post-close) but is INFORMATIVE: a real company raising capital should leave traces in SEC filings, insider disclosures, or technical activity. None present. The offering narrative is SUPPORTED by news but UNCORROBORATED by alternative data. This is the PUMP SIGNAL that motivates the short: a bullish narrative (capital raise, growth prospects) without hard-to-fake T1/T2/T3 corroboration. DECISION: WATCH (not short at this time) because: (1) SEC 8-K filing is expected within T+4 and will provide official confirmation; (2) post-offering share count is not yet disclosed, preventing precise dilution quantification; (3) Surge-Short Agent explicitly recommends watch pending SEC filing and share count; (4) Evidence sufficiency is PARTIAL but COHERENT. ESCALATION TRIGGER: If SEC 8-K is filed within T+4 confirming dilutive terms, AND stock stabilizes below 6.00 on volume, escalate to SHORT with 0.5% initial position per §4.8. If stock stabilizes above 7.00 on institutional volume, invalidate short thesis and move to NO_TRADE.
invalidation_conditions: If SEC 8-K filing shows material non-dilutive proceeds (strategic partnership, asset sale) rather than pure equity raise, bear thesis is weakened.
If Q4 2024 or Q1 2025 earnings show sustained high margins and revenue growth validating Q3 net income, fundamental support emerges.
If 13F filings show significant institutional accumulation post-offering, smart-money support contradicts short thesis.
If stock stabilizes above 7.00 on institutional volume, momentum exhaustion is invalidated and short thesis is broken.
If Wikipedia pageviews mapping is corrected and shows genuine AGMH company attention spike, alt-data corroboration improves.
risk_flags: Extreme valuation compression (PE 0.109, PB 0.019) may reflect data quality issue or one-time Q3 gain; verify net income sustainability.
Crypto/blockchain ASIC business is highly cyclical and sentiment-dependent; offering may signal management concern about future cash generation.
SEC 8-K filing not yet available (normal lag but absence is informative); if absent beyond T+4, escalate as potential disclosure violation.
Post-offering share count not disclosed; dilution impact cannot be quantified until share count is known.
Wikipedia pageviews on unrelated article (British_Overseas_Airways_Corporation) suggest alt-data adapter misconfiguration; no real corroboration.
Macro regime is Overheat/Moderately Restrictive with strict equity discipline; AGMH fails quality test and is subject to forced selling.
No insider buying, no Form 4 activity in 90 days; management not supporting stock post-offering.
Volume spike (3.1x 20d avg) on collapse day suggests panic selling, not accumulation; no institutional support visible.
Offering announced during 79.7% 5-day decline; market interpreted as distress signal, not growth catalyst.
Fundamental data is 6 months stale (Q3 2024); no Q4 2024 or Q1 2025 earnings available to assess sustainability.
suggested_improvements: Monitor SEC EDGAR for 8-K filing within next 2 business days; if absent beyond T+4, escalate as potential disclosure violation.
Obtain post-offering share count from company IR or SEC filing; recalculate EPS dilution impact.
Verify Q3 2024 net income of 9.0M; check for one-time gains or non-recurring items that inflate margins.
Assess crypto market sentiment and ASIC demand cycle at decision time; check if offering signals management concern about future cash generation.
Monitor stock price stabilization; if holds above 7.00 on volume, may indicate institutional support and invalidate short thesis.
Cross-check offering terms (price per share, warrant strike, exercise period) against news release and eventual 8-K filing.
Correct Wikipedia pageviews adapter mapping or disable for non-tech companies; current data is for unrelated historical airline.
Implement blockchain/crypto-mining industry-specific adapter (mining pool activity, ASIC shipment tracking, exchange listing status).
Obtain 13F filings post-offering to assess institutional positioning and smart-money support.
Query SEC EDGAR directly for 424B (prospectus) or other capital-raise filings to validate offering terms.

This is a data quality issue that undermines the alt-data corroboration layer. The sentiment_community_ownership_evidence block is entirely not_evaluated, limiting ability to assess institutional/insider positioning. The filing_confirmation block correctly shows no 8-K rows, which is itself a structural-absence signal per §13.6, but the absence is expected given normal SEC filing lag (1 business day post-close). However, evidence sufficiency is PARTIAL: SEC 8-K filing expected within T+4 (normal lag), post-offering share count not yet disclosed, and Surge-Short Agent explicitly recommends watch pending confirmation. ESCALATION TRIGGER: If SEC 8-K confirms dilutive terms AND stock stabilizes below 6.00, escalate to SHORT with 0.5% initial position. If stock stabilizes above 7.00 on institutional volume, invalidate thesis and move to NO_TRADE.

narrative_event.reasoning_summary: AGMH announced a $5.4M public offering on 2025-03-03 (pricing) and 2025-03-05 (closing), per GlobeNewswire press releases. The catalyst is CONCRETE and SPECIFIC: (1) exact dollar amount ($5.4M), (2) exact share count (16,390,000 Class A ordinary shares), (3) specific instrument type (Class A shares + warrants), (4) filing dates (2025-03-03 pricing, 2025-03-05 closing). The company's business is described as 'assembling and selling high-performance hardware and computing equipment, with a focus on blockchain-oriented ASIC chips and crypto miners.' SECTOR REASONING: AGMH is a hardware/manufacturing company in the crypto-mining equipment space. For such a company, a $5.4M capital raise is a concrete, verifiable event. The absence of SEC 8-K filing confirmation is notable but not disqualifying — press releases from GlobeNewswire (T1 publisher) are standard disclosure channels for offerings. The absence of insider Form 4 activity (zero transactions in 90d) is consistent with a small-cap in capital-raise mode. PRICE ACTION CONTEXT: Stock fell 79.7% over 5d (from $9.68 open on trigger day to $5.12 close on 2025-03-05). The offering was announced during this collapse. Two interpretations: (A) offering was announced to shore up liquidity amid market stress (dilutive, bearish signal); (B) offering was pre-planned and coincidentally announced during weakness. The news_event_summary sentiment field marks both items as 'positive' (investor confidence narrative), but the price action contradicts this — the stock tanked. This divergence suggests the market viewed the offering as dilutive or as a sign of financial distress, not as a growth catalyst. NARRATIVE SPECIFICITY: The offering details are concrete (dollar amount, share count, dates). The business description is vague ('blockchain-oriented ASIC chips') — a buzzword-adjacent framing common in crypto-adjacent companies. However, the offering itself is NOT vague; it is a specific capital event. ALTERNATIVE DATA: Wikipedia pageviews for 'British_Overseas_Airways_Corporation' (unrelated to AGMH) show modest activity (293–460 views/day over 30d window). This is NOT corroborating evidence for AGMH's offering and appears to be a data-mapping error or artifact. No GitHub, no FMP sentiment, no 13F data available. CONCLUSION: The catalyst is a SPECIFIC FINANCING EVENT (capital raise), not a vague narrative pivot. The specificity score is high (0.75) because the offering terms are concrete. However, the value-creation assessment is UNCLEAR because (1) the market's reaction was sharply negative, (2) the offering may signal financial distress rather than growth, and (3) the business description remains crypto-buzzword-heavy. Evidence sufficiency is PARTIAL: the offering is confirmed via press release, but SEC filing confirmation is absent, and no third-party corroboration or analyst commentary is available.
invalidation_conditions: If SEC 8-K filing for the offering is not found within 4 business days of 2025-03-05, the offering announcement may be unverified or withdrawn.
If the offering is subsequently cancelled or the shares are not issued, the catalyst is invalidated.
If the company's actual business model is materially different from 'blockchain-oriented ASIC chips and crypto miners' (e.g., if it is a shell or reverse-merger vehicle), the narrative is fabricated.
If the $5.4M figure is incorrect or the share count is materially different, the specificity claim is undermined.
risk_flags: DILUTION RISK: 16.39M new shares in a capital raise during a 79.7% 5-day decline suggests severe shareholder dilution and potential financial distress.

CRYPTO EXPOSURE: 'Blockchain-oriented ASIC chips and crypto miners' is a high-volatility, regulatory-uncertain sector. Macro regime is 'Overheat / Moderately Restrictive' (stress_score=2), which is unfavorable for speculative hardware plays.
VAGUE BUSINESS DESCRIPTION: 'Assembling and selling high-performance hardware' is generic; no mention of proprietary technology, customer base, or competitive moat.
NEGATIVE PRICE ACTION: Stock fell 79.7% in 5 days; offering announced during collapse. Market interpreted offering as distress signal, not growth catalyst.
MISSING SEC CONFIRMATION: No 8-K filing found in sec_edgar (0 rows in 90d lookback). Press release alone is insufficient for institutional confidence.
NO INSIDER SUPPORT: Zero Form 4 transactions in 90d; no insider buying to signal confidence in the offering or company direction.
ALTERNATIVE DATA MISMATCH: Wikipedia pageviews for 'British_Overseas_Airways_Corporation' (defunct airline) are unrelated to AGMH and suggest data-mapping error.
SENTIMENT POLLUTION: news_event_summary marks both items as 'positive' (investor confidence), but price action is sharply negative. Sentiment field may be auto-generated and unreliable.
suggested_improvements: Obtain SEC 8-K filing (Item 1.01 or 1.02) to confirm offering terms, use of proceeds, and underwriter details.
Cross-reference offering with FINRA TRACE or SEC EDGAR for actual share issuance and pricing.
Clarify AGMH's actual business: is it a manufacturer, distributor, or reseller of crypto-mining hardware? What is the customer base?
Investigate the 79.7% 5-day decline: was there a separate negative catalyst (earnings miss, regulatory action, insider selling) that preceded or accompanied the offering announcement?
Check for insider Form 4 filings in the 30 days AFTER the offering (not just before) to assess insider confidence.
Verify Wikipedia pageviews mapping: 'British_Overseas_Airways_Corporation' is a defunct airline and should not be associated with AGMH.
Obtain analyst reports or institutional investor commentary on the offering to assess market perception.
Review the offering prospectus (424B5 or equivalent) for risk factors, use of proceeds, and competitive positioning.

alt_data_verify.decision_or_assessment: Narrative-Price Dislocation Verification: AGMH surge-short candidate
alt_data_verify.reasoning_summary: AGMH exhibits extreme price collapse (-79.7% in 5d, -87.95% in 20d, -94% in 60d) coinciding with a $5.4M equity offering announced 2025-03-03 and closed 2025-03-05. The narrative is a capital raise by a blockchain/crypto-mining hardware company. Alternative-data verification reveals: (1) Wikipedia pageviews for 'British_Overseas_Airways_Corporation' (unrelated historical airline) show modest baseline activity (293–460 views/day) with no spike correlated to AGMH price action or offering announcement—this is a data-mapping artifact, not genuine company attention. (2) No GitHub activity (unmapped_ticker). (3) No FMP sentiment data. (4) No SEC Form 4 insider activity. (5) No recent 8-K filings. (6) Fundamental snapshot (Q3 2024, 6 months stale) shows positive earnings (EPS 14.5, net margin 63.93%) but TTM valuation metrics are not PIT-safe. The structural absence of hard-to-fake corroboration (SEC filings, insider activity, developer/technical signals, regulatory footprint) relative to what a legitimate hardware/crypto-mining company SHOULD produce is itself bear-thesis evidence. The offering narrative is supported by news (T3 source: GlobeNewswire press releases), but no alternative-data layer validates the company's operational substance or investor confidence. The Wikipedia pageview data is a false positive (wrong entity). Macro regime is 'Overheat / Moderately Restrictive' (stress_score=2), which caps equity allocation and mandates strict quality/valuation caution—AGMH's extreme valuation compression (PE=0.109, PB=0.019, EV/EBITDA=0.371) and price collapse suggest either severe distress or data quality issues. Absence of corroborating alt-data is informative: a real company raising capital should leave traces in SEC filings, insider disclosures, or technical activity. None present.
invalidation_conditions: If AGMH is a shell or reverse-merger vehicle with no operational business, the offering may be a financing mechanism for a future acquisition—alt-data absence would be expected.
If the Wikipedia pageview mapping is a system error (ticker AGMH mapped to wrong article), the attention signal is void.
If the company's business model is purely financial/capital-raising with no technical or regulatory footprint, absence of GitHub/FDA/patent data is not disqualifying.
If insider Form 4 data is delayed or not yet filed, the 90-day lookback may be premature.

Investigate whether the $5.4M offering was dilutive or at a significant discount to prior trading price.
Check if AGMH has any regulatory or compliance issues (SEC enforcement, exchange delisting warnings).

Wikipedia pageviews adapter is a fallback and has produced a data-mapping error (wrong entity). FMP sentiment and GitHub adapters are wired but returned zero rows. The information_integrity_assessment block is a placeholder (use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false per schema v1.1 decision #8). Sentiment/community/ownership evidence is not_evaluated. These gaps are expected in v1 but limit corroboration depth.
recommended_followups: Correct Wikipedia pageviews mapping or disable adapter for non-tech companies.
Implement blockchain/crypto-mining industry-specific adapter (mining pool activity, ASIC shipment tracking, exchange listing status).
Fetch full 10-K or latest 10-Q to assess operational substance and capital structure post-offering.
Query SEC EDGAR directly for 424B (prospectus) or 8-K (material events) filed around 2025-03-03 to 2025-03-05.
If AGMH is a legitimate operating company, investigate why insider Form 4 activity is absent (delayed filing, no trading, or shell status).
Cross-reference AGMH against crypto exchange listings and mining pool databases to validate operational footprint.
alt_data_verify.narrative_price_gap_rationale: AGMH price collapsed 94% in 60d and 79.7% in 5d, coinciding with a $5.4M equity offering (typically neutral-to-positive catalyst). The narrative (capital raise, growth prospects) does not explain the severity of the price decline. Alternative-data verification finds: (1) Wikipedia pageviews are mapped to wrong entity (data artifact). (2) No GitHub activity (unmapped). (3) No FMP sentiment. (4) No insider Form 4 activity. (5) No recent SEC 8-K filings. (6) Fundamental data is 6 months stale. The structural absence of hard-to-fake corroboration (SEC filings, insider activity, technical signals) relative to what a legitimate hardware/crypto-mining company should produce is bear-thesis evidence. The offering narrative is supported only by company press releases (T3 source); no independent corroboration. Macro regime is restrictive, which may amplify forced selling. The extreme price gap suggests either severe operational distress not yet disclosed, or data quality issues (shell company, delisting risk, or reverse merger). Absence of alt-data is informative and contradicts the positive offering narrative.
alt_data_verify.adapter_selection_reason: wikipedia_pageviews was the only adapter that returned rows (30 rows); however, data is mapped to wrong entity (British_Overseas_Airways_Corporation). No industry-specific adapters (blockchain/crypto mining) are wired in v1. Fallback to default adapter produced false positive.
alt_data_verify.hard_to_fake_signal_summary: No hard-to-fake signals present. SEC Form 4 (insider activity): 0 transactions in 90d. SEC 8-K (material events): 0 filings in 90d. GitHub (technical activity): unmapped_ticker. FMP sentiment (analyst/news aggregation): all endpoints empty. Wikipedia pageviews (attention): mapped to wrong entity. The absence of these signals, relative to what a legitimate operating company should produce, is itself bear-thesis evidence (informative absence). No positive hard-to-fake corroboration for the offering narrative.

News event summary: 2 press releases (T3 source) from company itself announcing offering pricing and closing.

surge_short.decision_or_assessment: Surge-short evaluation for AGMH following 88% intraday surge on financing catalyst

filing_confirmation: no 8-K filings in last 90 days
evidence_missing: SEC 8-K filing confirming the $5.4M offering details (news-only, no official disclosure)

Offering terms detail: price per share, warrant terms, dilution impact
Management commentary on use of proceeds
surge_short.reasoning_summary: AGMH surged from 5.25 (prior close) to 9.68 (open) on 2025-03-05 announcement of a $5.4M offering of Class A shares and warrants. By decision time (2025-03-06 09:30 ET), the stock had collapsed to 5.12 (-79.7% from trigger open, -2.5% from prior close). The catalyst is a financing event, not operational improvement. CRITICAL STRUCTURAL ABSENCE: The company announced a major capital raise on 2025-03-03 (pricing) and 2025-03-05 (closing), yet NO SEC 8-K filing appears in the filing_confirmation block (sec_edgar returned 0 rows in last 90 days). For a NASDAQ-listed company announcing a public offering, an 8-K is mandatory within 4 business days. The absence of this filing at decision time (2025-03-06 09:30 ET, 1 business day post-close) is consistent with normal SEC lag, but the news-only corroboration without official SEC disclosure is a structural-absence signal. Valuation metrics are extreme (PE 0.109, PB 0.019) but appear driven by Q3 2024 net income of 9.0M on revenue 14.1M — a 63.9% net margin that is atypical for a hardware/ASIC assembler and suggests either one-time gains or data quality issues. The company's business (blockchain ASIC chips, crypto miners) is cyclical and sentiment-dependent. The offering itself is dilutive and signals capital need. Wikipedia pageviews on an unrelated historical airline article provide no corroboration of the company's narrative. No insider buying, no institutional support signals, no developer/tech community validation. The surge was momentum-driven on financing news; the collapse reflects immediate dilution realization and lack of fundamental support. Short thesis: the offering is dilutive, the valuation is unsustainably compressed, and the lack of SEC filing corroboration combined with structural absence of institutional/insider support suggests the market is repricing the dilution downward.
invalidation_conditions: If SEC 8-K is filed post-decision showing material non-dilutive proceeds (e.g., strategic partnership, asset sale) rather than pure equity raise
If Q4 2024 or Q1 2025 earnings show sustained high margins and revenue growth, validating the Q3 net income
If insider buying or 13F filings show significant institutional accumulation post-offering
If the stock stabilizes above 7.00 and volume normalizes, indicating institutional support

No insider buying, no Form 4 activity in 90 days — management not supporting stock

The bear thesis (dilutive offering, momentum-driven surge, lack of institutional support) is valid but evidence sufficiency is partial. Recommend monitoring for SEC 8-K filing, post-offering share count, and price stabilization before committing to short position. pm.decision_or_assessment: Surge-short entry decision for AGMH following 88% intraday collapse on dilutive financing catalyst
evidence_used: filing_confirmation: no 8-K filings in last 90 days
evidence_missing: SEC 8-K filing confirming offering details (expected within T+4, normal lag)
Post-offering share count and dilution impact quantification
pm.reasoning_summary: AGMH surged 88% intraday (5.25 prior close → 9.68 open) on announcement of a $5.4M equity offering of 16.39M Class A shares and warrants, then collapsed 79.7% by decision time (5.12 close). The catalyst is a DILUTIVE FINANCING EVENT, not operational improvement. Narrative Agent confirms the offering is SPECIFIC (exact dollar amount, share count, dates) and SUPPORTED by GlobeNewswire press releases (T3 source). Alt-Data Verification finds STRUCTURAL ABSENCE of hard-to-fake corroboration: no SEC 8-K filing yet (normal lag but informative absence), no insider Form 4 activity (0 transactions in 90d), no 13F institutional positioning (adapter unavailable), no FMP sentiment (endpoints empty), no GitHub activity (unmapped). Wikipedia pageviews are mapped to unrelated historical airline article (data artifact). Fundamental snapshot (Q3 2024) shows positive earnings but is 6 months stale; valuation metrics are extreme (PE 0.109, PB 0.019) suggesting either data quality issue or severe distress. Surge-Short Agent recommends WATCH (not short) due to partial evidence sufficiency and missing SEC 8-K confirmation. Risk Agent finds NO HARD VETO TRIPPED: data_after_cutoff_used=false, lookahead_safe=true, no critical data_quality_flags, candidate_type=surge_short exempts from §5.13(d) pollution veto. Macro regime is Overheat/Moderately Restrictive with strict equity discipline; AGMH fails quality test. PREPONDERANCE OF EVIDENCE: The bear thesis is COHERENT and SUPPORTED by multiple dimensions: (1) MOMENTUM-DRIVEN SURGE on dilutive financing (not value creation); (2) STRUCTURAL ABSENCE of institutional/insider support (Form 4 zero, 13F unavailable, no analyst sentiment); (3) EXTREME VALUATION COMPRESSION (PE 0.109, PB 0.019) inconsistent with sustainable business; (4) NEGATIVE PRICE ACTION (79.7% 5d collapse) contradicting positive offering narrative; (5) MACRO HEADWINDS (Overheat regime, strict equity discipline); (6) CRYPTO/ASIC SECTOR CYCLICALITY (high volatility, regulatory uncertainty). The absence of SEC 8-K filing is EXPECTED given normal lag (1 business day post-close) but is INFORMATIVE: a real company raising capital should leave traces in SEC filings, insider disclosures, or technical activity. None present. The offering narrative is SUPPORTED by news but UNCORROBORATED by alternative data. This is the PUMP SIGNAL that motivates the short: a bullish narrative (capital raise, growth prospects) without hard-to-fake T1/T2/T3 corroboration. DECISION: WATCH (not short at this time) because: (1) SEC 8-K filing is expected within T+4 and will provide official confirmation; (2) post-offering share count is not yet disclosed, preventing precise dilution quantification; (3) Surge-Short Agent explicitly recommends watch pending SEC filing and share count; (4) Evidence sufficiency is PARTIAL but COHERENT. ESCALATION TRIGGER: If SEC 8-K is filed within T+4 confirming dilutive terms, AND stock stabilizes below 6.00 on volume, escalate to SHORT with 0.5% initial position per §4.8. If stock stabilizes above 7.00 on institutional volume, invalidate short thesis and move to NO_TRADE.
invalidation_conditions: If SEC 8-K filing shows material non-dilutive proceeds (strategic partnership, asset sale) rather than pure equity raise, bear thesis is weakened.
If Q4 2024 or Q1 2025 earnings show sustained high margins and revenue growth validating Q3 net income, fundamental support emerges.
If 13F filings show significant institutional accumulation post-offering, smart-money support contradicts short thesis.
If stock stabilizes above 7.00 on institutional volume, momentum exhaustion is invalidated and short thesis is broken.
If Wikipedia pageviews mapping is corrected and shows genuine AGMH company attention spike, alt-data corroboration improves.

rule_engine_path: Surge-short entry framework (Pass 7, §2.1 + §2.9-§2.12 pre-filters already applied at ranking)
(i) Surge dynamic showing exhaustion: YES — intraday collapse from 9.68 to 5.12 (79.7% 5d decline) shows momentum exhaustion
(ii) Public narrative inconsistent with verifiable evidence: YES — positive offering narrative contradicted by extreme price collapse and lack of institutional support
(iii) Structural absence relative to sector-expected evidence: YES — hardware/crypto-mining company should show SEC filings, insider activity, technical signals; none present
(iv) Negative or zero fundamental ratios: PARTIAL — valuation extreme (PE 0.109) but fundamentals show positive earnings (Q3 2024); data quality uncertain
(v) Reverse-split / pump-related corporate action history: NOT EVALUATED — no reverse-split data in packet
Preponderance of evidence: COHERENT BEAR THESIS supported by (i), (ii), (iii), and macro headwinds
Evidence sufficiency: PARTIAL — SEC 8-K expected within T+4, post-offering share count not disclosed
Surge-Short Agent recommendation: WATCH (not short at this time)
